response: People can use several methods to manage personal finance effectively. They can track their income and expenses to understand their financial situation. They can create a budget that allocates funds for essential needs and savings. They can set financial goals and work towards achieving them. They can build an emergency fund to cover unexpected expenses. They can avoid debt and manage credit wisely. They can invest in assets that provide long-term growth. They can review and adjust their financial plan regularly. They can use financial tools and apps to monitor their progress. They can educate themselves about personal finance and make informed decisions. They can seek professional advice when needed.
